_note: Label Sprint round for follicle — generated follicle_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the Graafian follicle.

hotspots.label: Theca
hotspots.detail: The outer follicular wall enclosing the follicle.

hotspots.label: Antrum
hotspots.detail: The large fluid-filled cavity within the follicle.

hotspots.label: Cumulus oophorus
hotspots.detail: The mound of cells that anchors the ovum to the follicle wall.

hotspots.label: Corona radiata
hotspots.detail: A ring of small cells immediately surrounding the ovum.

hotspots.label: Zona pellucida
hotspots.detail: A thin clear layer just outside the ovum's own membrane.

hotspots.label: Ovum
hotspots.detail: The egg cell, with its nucleus visible at the centre.

generation_prompt: Graafian follicle cross-section, ovum, medical-textbook diagram
